notes: This snapshot is available for standalone testing but is not a completed survival-clear strategy.
The route now reaches the W3208 barrier/core node, beyond the old W2960 boss-entry target.
Current blocker is the W3208 fixed core cluster: type16 HP16 parts, type17 HP32 center, and close type1 enemies collapsing into the player.
nextTrainingFocus: Create a W3180-W3220 barrier-node action lock that does not release into default down+B.
Add fixed-target HP monitoring for type16/type17 so the AI holds a useful firing angle until HP drops.
Handle close type1 enemies at dx -4..8 before they touch the player during the boss-core station.
